summary: TalentOS Career OS - All 7 requested features tested and verified. Backend APIs (interview start/message, job search, payment config, resume analysis, health) working correctly. Frontend pages (/talentos, /talentos/interview, /talentos/jobs, /talentos/pricing) loading and functional.

minor.issue: Adzuna API returns empty results for 'programmatic advertising' in US location - may be due to limited ad-tech job inventory in Adzuna's US database. Works fine for broader terms like 'marketing manager'.

critical_code_review_comments: All 14 backend tests passed (100% success rate)
Interview flow works end-to-end with STAR scoring and filler word detection
Adzuna API integration working - returns real job listings
LLM (GPT-4o via Emergent) available and working for resume analysis
test_credentials: No auth required - guest user_id generated automatically
seed_data_creation: Interview sessions created during testing (session IDs: interview_78b48a4f40e7, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TalentOS Career OS fully tested. Backend routes: /api/talentos/interview/start, /api/talentos/interview/message, /api/talentos/analyze, /api/talentos/health, /api/jobs/search, /api/jobs/config, /api/payments/config. Frontend routes: /talentos (landing), /talentos/interview (mock interview room with STAR scoring), /talentos/jobs (Adzuna job search), /talentos/pricing (Razorpay integration). Adtech knowledge base has 50+ questions across 10 categories.
passed_tests: 1. TalentOS landing page loads at /talentos - PASS
2. Interview /start returns session_id and first question from adtech knowledge base (Header Bidding category) - PASS
3. Interview /message returns STAR scores (Situation, Task, Action, Result) and follow-up questions - PASS
4. Filler word detection working (detects um, like, basically, you know) - PASS
5. Job search /api/jobs/search returns Adzuna API results - PASS
6. Payment config /api/payments/config returns Razorpay key and pricing tiers - PASS
7. TalentOS health /api/talentos/health confirms LLM availability (llm_available=true) - PASS
8. Resume analysis /api/talentos/analyze returns match score and skill gaps - PASS
9. Interview Room UI starts session and displays questions - PASS
10. Jobs Discovery page shows Adzuna badge and search results - PASS
11. Pricing page shows Free/Pro Monthly/Pro Yearly tiers with ₹1 trial - PASS
12. Interview knowledge base has 50+ questions in 10 categories - PASS

mocked_integrations.Job scraping (/api/jobs/scrape): MOCKED - Returns mock job data, actual Playwright scraping not implemented

verified_integrations.Adzuna API: LIVE - Real job search working with app_id=021ac0ca
verified_integrations.Emergent LLM (GPT-4o): LIVE - llm_available=true, used for resume analysis
